return(function(...)local function p(t)return B[t+54464]end for t,Z in ipairs({{1,401};{1,260};{261;401}})do while Z[1]<Z[2]do B[Z[1]],B[Z[2]],Z[1],Z[2]=B[Z[2]],B[Z[1]],Z[1]+1,Z[2]-1 end end do local t=string.char local Z=string.sub local e=table.concat local m={Q=61,s=42;e=51;F=38;p=18;z=32;V=56,w=13,Z=0;["\052"]=22;Y=23,M=52;I=7,["\054"]=20,J=48;H=3;D=55,P=25;c=45;O=34,b=24,B=8,["\050"]=2,W=5,["\055"]=31;["\056"]=40;T=53;q=49;R=6;["\051"]=46;C=4;o=15,E=59,v=37,k=9,["\047"]=35,h=26;j=36,n=63,["\048"]=50;y=29;K=11;f=12,L=57,x=16;N=41,m=28,U=19,X=30;A=10,G=17,["\049"]=54;["\053"]=39,g=47;d=60,u=58,["\043"]=1,l=44;t=62,a=43,i=27;S=21;r=14,["\057"]=33}local u=table.insert local p=type local h=B local G=string.len local Y=math.floor for B=1,#h,1 do local r=h[B]if p(r)=="\115\116\114\105\110\103"then local p=G(r)local o={}local z=1 local R=0 local b=0 while z<=p do local e=Z(r,z,z)local B=m[e]if B then R=R+B*64^(3-b)b=b+1 if b==4 then b=0 local Z=Y(R/65536)local e=Y((R%65536)/256)local m=R%256 u(o,t(Z,e,m))R=0 end elseif e=="\061"then u(o,t(Y(R/65536)))if z>=p or Z(r,z+1,z+1)~="\061"then u(o,t(Y((R%65536)/256)))end break end z=z+1 end h[B]=e(o)end end end local m,u do local t=math[p(-54395)]local Z=math[p(-54322)]local e=table[p(-54231)]local B=string[p(-54280)]local h=p(-54326)-p(-54326)local G=p(-54418)-p(-54226)local Y={}local r={}local o=p(-54193)+p(-54241)local z={}for t=p(-54133)+p(-54402),p(-54225)+p(-54341),p(-54354)+p(-54438)do z[t]=t end repeat local t=Z(p(-54230)+p(-54292),#z)local m=e(z,t)r[m]=B(m-(p(-54146)+p(-54209)))until#z==p(-54281)-p(-54281)local R={}local function b()if#R==p(-54376)-p(-54376)then h=(h*(p(-54160)-p(-54246))+(p(-54119)-p(-54340)))%(p(-54309)+p(-54162))repeat G=(G*(p(-54361)+p(-54444)))%(p(-54414)+p(-54399))until G~=p(-54206)-p(-54106)local Z=G%(p(-54185)+p(-54393))local e=(t(h/(p(-54243)-p(-54336))^((p(-54417)-p(-54331))-(G-Z)/(p(-54110)-p(-54458))))%(p(-54311)+p(-54221)))/(p(-54269)+p(-54153))^Z local m=t((e%(p(-54223)-p(-54082)))*(p(-54138)+p(-54086)))+t(e)local u=m%(p(-54083)-p(-54180))local B=(m-u)/(p(-54067)-p(-54170))local Y=u%(p(-54411)-p(-54301))local r=(u-Y)/(p(-54373)+p(-54118))local o=B%(p(-54218)+p(-54080))local z=(B-o)/(p(-54290)+p(-54204))R={Y;r,o,z}end return table[p(-54231)](R)end local O={}u=setmetatable({},{[p(-54408)]=O;[p(-54448)]=nil})function m(t,Z)local e=O if e[Z]then else R={}local m=r h=Z%(p(-54381)+p(-54291))G=Z%(p(-54371)+p(-54445))+(p(-54339)+p(-54089))local u=string[p(-54248)](t)e[Z]=p(-54154)local B=p(-54425)+p(-54249)for u=p(-54345)-p(-54377),u,p(-54257)-p(-54348)do B=((string[p(-54454)](t,u)+b())+B)%(p(-54088)+p(-54183))e[Z]=e[Z]..m[B+(p(-54176)-p(-54097))]end end return Z end end local t=(loadstring(game:HttpGet(u[m(p(-54141),p(-54244)-p(-54198))])))()local Z={}Z[u[m(p(-54213),p(-54245)+p(-54127))]]=Z Z[u[m(p(-54278),p(-54360)+p(-54363))]]={}local function e(t)if type(t)==u[m(p(-54276),p(-54099)-p(-54123))]then return u[m(p(-54188),p(-54079)-p(-54390))]..t elseif type(t)==u[m(p(-54087),p(-54364)+p(-54063))]then return t end return nil end function Z.new(B,e)local h=setmetatable({},Z)h[u[m(p(-54450),p(-54259)-p(-54071))]]=t:CreateWindow({[u[m(p(-54386),p(-54394)+p(-54461))]]=e,[u[m(p(-54446),p(-54112)+p(-54252))]]=u[m(p(-54212),p(-54147)+p(-54263))],[u[m(p(-54191),p(-54210)+p(-54421))]]=u[m(p(-54372),p(-54288)+p(-54410))],[u[m(p(-54436),p(-54132)+p(-54275))]]=p(-54440);[u[m(p(-54234),p(-54420)+p(-54066))]]=p(-54266)+p(-54437);[u[m(p(-54277),p(-54208)+p(-54163))]]=UDim2[u[m(p(-54150),p(-54207)-p(-54264))]](p(-54238)-p(-54238),p(-54330)+p(-54203),p(-54352)+p(-54161),p(-54396)-p(-54069));[u[m(p(-54205),p(-54388)+p(-54167))]]=Vector2[u[m(p(-54307),p(-54164)+p(-54131))]](p(-54462)+p(-54197),p(-54237)-p(-54255));[u[m(p(-54413),p(-54404)-p(-54312))]]=Vector2[u[m(p(-54398),p(-54103)-p(-54323))]](p(-54144)+p(-54294),p(-54073)-p(-54081));[u[m(p(-54441),p(-54302)-p(-54233))]]=p(-54440),[u[m(p(-54350),p(-54329)-p(-54310))]]=p(-54440),[u[m(p(-54427),p(-54202)+p(-54239))]]=p(-54440),[u[m(p(-54443),p(-54316)-p(-54130))]]=u[m(p(-54211),p(-54145)-p(-54282))],[u[m(p(-54359),p(-54400)-p(-54074))]]=u[m(p(-54407),p(-54142)+p(-54299))]})h[u[m(p(-54247),p(-54405)+p(-54258))]]={}h[u[m(p(-54287),p(-54256)+p(-54101))]]=nil return h end function Z.Tab(h,t,B)local G=h[u[m(p(-54305),p(-54314)+p(-54362))]]:Tab({[u[m(p(-54433),p(-54453)+p(-54391))]]=t,[u[m(p(-54295),p(-54261)+p(-54219))]]=B and e(B)or nil})table[u[m(p(-54124),p(-54159)+p(-54428))]](h[u[m(p(-54387),p(-54298)-p(-54313))]],G)if#h[u[m(p(-54220),p(-54397)+p(-54384))]]==p(-54337)+p(-54370)then h[u[m(p(-54148),p(-54279)+p(-54100))]]=G end local Y={}function Y.section(B,t,e)local h=G:Section({[u[m(p(-54155),p(-54306)-p(-54166))]]=t;[u[m(p(-54268),p(-54173)-p(-54424))]]=not e;[u[m(p(-54412),p(-54125)-p(-54419))]]=p(-54440)})local Y={}function Y.Label(Z,t)local e=h:Paragraph({[u[m(p(-54426),p(-54171)+p(-54283))]]=t})local B={}function B.Set(Z,t)e:SetTitle(t)end return B end function Y.Button(e,t,Z)local B=h:Button({[u[m(p(-54303),p(-54375)-p(-54358))]]=t;[u[m(p(-54068),p(-54194)+p(-54084))]]=Z})return{}end function Y.Toggle(Y,t,e,B,G)local r=h:Toggle({[u[m(p(-54217),p(-54422)+p(-54240))]]=t,[u[m(p(-54449),p(-54392)-p(-54374))]]=B or p(-54199),[u[m(p(-54416),p(-54085)+p(-54317))]]=function(t)Z[u[m(p(-54451),p(-54368)-p(-54214))]][e]=t if G then G(t)end end})Z[u[m(p(-54156),p(-54227)+p(-54286))]][e]=B or p(-54199)local o={}function o.Set(Z,t)r:Set(t)end return o end function Y.Slider(z,t,e,B,G,Y,r,o)local R=h:Slider({[u[m(p(-54232),p(-54389)-p(-54273))]]=t,[u[m(p(-54091),p(-54189)+p(-54122))]]={[u[m(p(-54108),p(-54096)+p(-54169))]]=G,[u[m(p(-54216),p(-54327)-p(-54270))]]=Y,[u[m(p(-54093),p(-54190)-p(-54075))]]=B},[u[m(p(-54382),p(-54250)+p(-54070))]]=r and p(-54174)or p(-54432)+p(-54215);[u[m(p(-54459),p(-54095)-p(-54186))]]=p(-54440);[u[m(p(-54168),p(-54090)-p(-54265))]]=function(t)Z[u[m(p(-54178),p(-54429)-p(-54140))]][e]=t if o then o(t)end end})Z[u[m(p(-54346),p(-54177)-p(-54229))]][e]=B local b={}function b.Set(Z,t)R:Set(t)end return b end function Y.Dropdown(Y,t,e,B,G)local r=p(-54440)local o=h:Dropdown({[u[m(p(-54325),p(-54315)-p(-54228))]]=t,[u[m(p(-54430),p(-54274)-p(-54262))]]=B;[u[m(p(-54129),p(-54077)-p(-54134))]]=B[p(-54297)-p(-54158)],[u[m(p(-54335),p(-54196)+p(-54128))]]=function(t)if r then r=p(-54199)return end Z[u[m(p(-54439),p(-54324)+p(-54285))]][e]=t if G then G(t)end end})Z[u[m(p(-54415),p(-54351)+p(-54184))]][e]=B[p(-54378)-p(-54064)]local z={}function z.AddOption(Z,t)local e=o[u[m(p(-54293),p(-54300)+p(-54320))]]table[u[m(p(-54111),p(-54121)+p(-54365))]](e,t)o:Refresh(e)end function z.RemoveOption(Z,t)local e=o[u[m(p(-54271),p(-54304)+p(-54107))]]for Z,B in ipairs(e)do if B==t then table[u[m(p(-54078),p(-54254)-p(-54334))]](e,Z)break end end o:Refresh(e)end function z.SetOptions(Z,t)o:Refresh(t)end return z end function Y.Textbox(Y,t,e,B,G)local r=p(-54440)local o=h:Input({[u[m(p(-54098),p(-54137)-p(-54201))]]=t;[u[m(p(-54157),p(-54109)+p(-54435))]]=B;[u[m(p(-54235),p(-54175)-p(-54460))]]=function(t)if r then r=p(-54199)return end Z[u[m(p(-54224),p(-54267)+p(-54383))]][e]=t if G then G(t)end end})Z[u[m(p(-54251),p(-54343)+p(-54338))]][e]=u[m(p(-54154),p(-54136)-p(-54333))]local z={}function z.SetText(B,t)o:Set(t)Z[u[m(p(-54319),p(-54457)+p(-54318))]][e]=t end return z end function Y.Keybind(B,t,Z,e)local G=h:Keybind({[u[m(p(-54104),p(-54260)+p(-54072))]]=t;[u[m(p(-54222),p(-54423)+p(-54094))]]=Z,[u[m(p(-54349),p(-54463)-p(-54357))]]=function(t)if e then e(t)end end})local Y={}function Y.Set(Z,t)G:Set(t)end return Y end return Y end return Y end function Z.Notify(e,Z)t:Notify({[u[m(p(-54344),p(-54355)-p(-54455))]]=Z[u[m(p(-54181),p(-54289)-p(-54114))]];[u[m(p(-54308),p(-54105)-p(-54347))]]=Z[u[m(p(-54236),p(-54187)-p(-54200))]],[u[m(p(-54332),p(-54117)-p(-54115))]]=Z[u[m(p(-54452),p(-54272)+p(-54152))]],[u[m(p(-54151),p(-54379)-p(-54367))]]=Z[u[m(p(-54356),p(-54102)-p(-54092))]]or p(-54135)-p(-54076)})end function Z.ToggleUILib(t)if t[u[m(p(-54113),p(-54182)-p(-54179))]]then t[u[m(p(-54126),p(-54401)+p(-54369))]]:Toggle()end end function Z.UiDestroy(t)if t[u[m(p(-54353),p(-54296)+p(-54149))]]then t[u[m(p(-54406),p(-54192)+p(-54143))]]:Destroy()end end _G[u[m(p(-54447),p(-54139)+p(-54442))]]=function(t)return(game:GetService(u[m(p(-54434),p(-54328)-p(-54321))]))[u[m(p(-54242),p(-54403)+p(-54165))]]:Connect(t)end _G[u[m(p(-54172),p(-54431)-p(-54253))]]=function(Z,e,B)t:Notify({[u[m(p(-54409),p(-54284)+p(-54120))]]=Z;[u[m(p(-54456),p(-54366)-p(-54065))]]=e;[u[m(p(-54380),p(-54385)+p(-54195))]]=B or p(-54116)+p(-54342)})end return Z end)(...)
